subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Thou hast attained unto the effusions of the Most Exalted Pen and been illumined by the lights of the utterance of the All-Merciful. I swear by the mystery of existence on this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد باثار قلم اعلی فائز شدی و بانوار بیان رحمن منور قسم بسر وجود امروز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
